de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction

Interface Constructor

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ClassTypeContainer, Member, Method, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ConstructorDeclaration, DefaultConstructor

    public interface Constructor
extends Method
    A program model element representing constructors. Constructors are modelled as subtypes of methods and will return the enclosing type as return type.

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction.Method

        isAbstract, isNative, isSynchronized

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction.ProgramModelElement

        getFullName

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.java.NamedModelElement

        getName
